prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 6051→7688→5566→8820→15378，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024 年因高考模式改革（文理分科→3+1+2）位次从 5566 后移至 8820，2025 年进一步大幅后移至 15378，近两年累计后移约 9800 名，2025 年基准约 15378 名；本省理科（物理类）计划 2021 年 96 人、2022 年 97 人、2023 年 85 人、2024 年 60 人、2025 年 52 人，呈持续缩减趋势；2026 年计划 53 人，较 2025 年微增 1 人（+1.9%），小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2021 年第 44 名、2022 年第 43 名、2023 年第 40 名、2024 年第 43 名、2025 年第 46 名、2026 年第 46 名，排名稳定在 40–46 区间，属全国中上游水平；2024 年声誉偏正面（食堂改善），2026 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第 46 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录，整体报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中，苏州大学拥有 A- 及以上学科 2 个：体育学 A-、药学 A-；与理科招生专业相关的药学 A- 对药学类、生物制药等专业有一定吸引力，但整体优势学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定，苏州大学在上述领域均有招生；本省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 218700 人，较 2025 年（物理类 121443+历史类 58374=179817）增长约 21.6%，竞争加剧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角经济发达地区，对西北省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在本省无特殊招生倾斜，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响呈稳中有升态势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026 年招生计划微扩（+1.9%）、本省考生总数明显增长（+21.6%）、声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年理科最低位次在 2025 年基准 15378 名基础上略有回稳但仍在高位；预测最低位次约 15526 名，区间 15026–16026 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6051→7688→5566→8820→15378, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; in 2024, due to the reform of the college entrance examination model (from arts/science division to 3+1+2), the ranking shifted from 5566 to 8820, and in 2025, it further significantly shifted to 15378, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9800 positions over the past two years, and a baseline of approximately 15378 in 2025; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 96 in 2021, 97 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 60 in 2024, and 52 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 53, a slight increase of 1 (+1.9%) compared to 2025, and the small expansion slightly alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 44th in 2021, 43rd in 2022, 40th in 2023, 43rd in 2024, 46th in 2025, and 46th in 2026, with rankings stable in the 40–46 range, at the upper-middle level nationally; in 2024, the reputation was slightly positive (improved cafeteria), while in 2026, it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 46th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps, overall application attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has 2 disciplines rated A- or above: Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-; among these, Pharmacy A-, related to science enrollment majors, has some appeal for pharmacy, biopharmaceutical, and other majors, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is relatively small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be hot/highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity, and Soochow University enrolls in these fields; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (physics category 121,443 + history category 58,374 = 179,817), intensifying competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from northwestern provinces; the university has no special enrollment preferences in this province, and cross-provincial application popularity is steadily rising due to regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+1.9%), the significant increase in the number of provincial candidates (+21.6%), and the negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will stabilize slightly but remain high based on the 2025 baseline of 15,378; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15,526, with a range of 15,026–16,026.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Nanomaterials and Technology
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Statistics

- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)

- Clinical Medicine

- Preventive Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biotechnology
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Light Chemical Engineering
- Metallurgical Engineering
- Fashion Design and Engineering
- Metallic Materials Engineering
- Nursing.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15,026–16,026, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Data Science, Statistics, Optoelectronics, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Software Engineering, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, etc.) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Biotechnology, Materials, Light Chemical Engineering, etc.) as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15,026), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16,026), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科（历史类）最低位次约 779→1094→924→1309→1155，整体呈波动后移趋势（位次数字增大），2021–2025 年累计后移约 376 名；2025 年基准约 1155 名；本省文科（历史类）计划 2021 年 18 人、2022 年 18 人、2023 年 19 人、2024 年 14 人、2025 年 14 人；2026 年计划 27 人，较 2025 年大幅扩招 13 人（+92.9%），扩招幅度极大，将显著加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名稳定在 40–46 名区间（2026 年第 46 名），属全国中上游水平；2024 年声誉偏正面（食堂改善获好评），2026 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第 46 位（较热），整体关注度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，苏州大学拥有 A- 及以上学科 2 个：体育学 A-、药学 A-；文科招生专业中无直接对应的 A 类学科，但中国语言文学、法学等学科实力在 B+ 层次，对文科考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学、师范/教育等文科热门专业社会热度偏热/推荐，新闻传播学明显劝退；本省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 218700 人，按近年历史类占比约 33% 估算约 72171 人，较 2025 年历史类 58374 人增长约 23.6%，竞争加剧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，长三角经济发达地区，对西北省份文科考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在本省无特殊招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次 1155 的基准、2026 年招生计划大幅扩招（+92.9%）、本省考生总数明显增长（+23.6%）、声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年文科最低位次将较 2025 年明显后移；预测最低位次约 1829 名，区间 1555–2103 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 779→1094→924→1309→1155, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative decline of about 376 places from 2021 to 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1155; the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 27, a significant expansion of 13 places (+92.9%) compared to 2025, which will markedly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking stable in the 40–46 range (46th in 2026), at the upper-middle level nationally; reputation in 2024 was slightly positive (cafeteria improvements praised), while in 2026 it was slightly negative (campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 46th (relatively hot), overall attention moderately high; no obvious admission gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has 2 A- or above disciplines: Physical Education A-, Pharmacy A-; among liberal arts enrollment majors, there are no directly corresponding A-class disciplines, but disciplines like Chinese Language and Literature and Law are at the B+ level, offering some appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Teacher Training/Education and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot/recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of regular college entrance exam candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 72,171 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 33%, an increase of about 23.6% from 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from northwestern provinces; the university has no special enrollment preferences in this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking baseline of 1155, the significant expansion of enrollment plans in 2026 (+92.9%), the notable increase in provincial candidates (+23.6%), and the slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will decline significantly compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1829, with a range of 1555–2103.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training)
- Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Library, Information and Archives Management (Archives, Information Resource Management)
- English (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1555–2103, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Library, Information and Archives Management, English Teacher Training) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature Teacher Training, Law) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (History Teacher Training, Journalism) as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1555), you can focus on Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2103), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
